/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/optlib_bench.dir/bench_newton.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optlib_bench.dir/bench_lbfgs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optlib_bench.dir/bench_cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optlib_bench.dir/bench_simd.cpp.o -o optlib_bench  ../_deps/benchmark-build/src/libbenchmark.a ../_deps/benchmark-build/src/libbenchmark_main.a ../_deps/benchmark-build/src/libbenchmark.a -lrt
